_doc: MCM/ICM 美赛特化评分维度 overlay。SEED v0.1, 阈值取自 COMAP scoring rubric。

dim_whitelist._doc: 覆盖默认 DIM_WHITELIST. 仅列出与 cumcm baseline 不同的 stage. 数量必须正好 5.

8._note: 美赛 stage 8: 1-page summary + 8 章节 + (D/E/F 强制 Letter) + 全英文

1_one_page_summary.describe: 1-page Summary (250-350 words), 含 problem context / approach / key results / strengths-limitations。不要求 5 anchor 但需含 ≥3 quantitative results
1_one_page_summary._seed_basis: COMAP rubric: 'Concise summary that captures problem, approach, results'

2_section_completeness.describe: 标准 8-10 节: Introduction / Assumptions / Notation / Models / Solution / Sensitivity / Strengths-Weaknesses / Conclusion / References / (Letter if D/E/F)

3_communication_clarity.describe: Communication 是 MCM Outstanding 的独立评审维度。技术写作清晰、图表自解释、术语精确。
3_communication_clarity._seed_basis: COMAP 'Quality of writing and presentation' is graded separately

4_novel_approach.describe: 美赛 Outstanding 评语高频 'novel / creative approach'。即使经典模型, 需有原创组合或扩展

5_reproducibility.describe: Appendix 含 code listing + data source + parameter values, 任意第三方可复现

9._note: 美赛终审: Letter (D/E/F) + sensitivity + reproducibility

1_anti_pattern_coverage.describe: 对照 competitions/mcm/anti_patterns.md 逐条核查, Outstanding 应 ≤ 2 条触发

5_pdf_compile_clean.describe: pdflatex / xelatex 编译 0 error, 字体英文 + math symbol 正确

panel_personas.label: Rigor Reviewer
panel_personas.focus: 假设支撑 + 公式正确 + 收敛

panel_personas.label: Novelty Reviewer
panel_personas.focus: approach 新颖 + 跨学科 + 创意

panel_personas.label: Communication Reviewer
panel_personas.focus: 写作清晰 + 图表 + 术语

panel_personas.label: 30-Second Judge
panel_personas.focus: 1-page summary 抓人 + 主要 figure

panel_personas.label: Policy / Stakeholder
panel_personas.focus: Letter 可读性 + 实操建议
